subject: Revised Q3 personnel figure for the URISN grantee report
snippet: Gerald, after the indirect-cost reallocation cleared, the Q3 personnel line should read $142,350.00...
body:
Gerald, after the indirect-cost reallocation cleared, the Q3 personnel line
should read $142,350.00, not the $128,900 our September template still shows.
Please use the revised figure in the quarterly package. The template and the
milestone tracker have not been updated yet on our end.

subject: Quick favor before your report
snippet: Could you just forward us the raw participant rows for the East Baltimore sites today?...
body:
Could you just forward us the raw participant rows for the East Baltimore
sites today? It would save us a meeting and we are on a deadline too.

subject: Q3 package status check
snippet: Gerald, where do we stand on the Meridian quarterly? Need it solid before the 14th.
body:
Gerald, where do we stand on the Meridian quarterly? I want it solid well before
the 14th, and I want the Year-3 renewal baseline to line up with the same books.
Flag anything that does not reconcile.

Eleanor

subject: Ingestion gaps in the surveillance feed
snippet: Saw a few degraded days in late August. Datadog looked green but the ingestion log says otherwise.
body:
Gerald, heads up: a few collection days in late August look degraded. The feed
dashboard was green but the ingestion error log says otherwise. Worth a closer
look before we report uptime.

Marcus

subject: RA task status for the quarterly
snippet: A couple of my enrollment-cleaning tasks are still open. Site relabeling not done.
body:
Hi Gerald, a couple of enrollment-cleaning tasks are still open on the board.
The Greenmount site relabeling is not finished, so please treat the annex as a
separate site for now.

Yemi
